design: 2 seeds per cell (bare vs skill), fresh fixture copy per run, GROUND-TRUTH.md withheld from executors, graded by execution (pytest re-run) and diff against the pristine fixture, single reviewer, smoke-grade

result: Ceiling null on the integration decision at the weak tier: 4 of 4 runs scored 2 in both cells. The BACKSTOP artifact transferred: present in 2 of 2 skill runs (1 verbatim, 1 case-variant), absent in 2 of 2 bare runs.
fixture_review: Adversarial design review judged the fixture not pre-solved: the contract's ACCEPT line plus the test filename over-determine the verification tool, and nothing in the prompt names the judgment under test (re-run versus trust). Ground truth hardened before publication: fix-plus-route-back now caps at 1, editing the test to force a pass scores 0, escalate-to-human parity stated, rule quotation corrected to verbatim, do-not-include header added.
open_question: Discriminating power at any tier likely requires burying the contract (for example, the report paraphrases it) or a noisier wave context; declared as the fixture's next design round.
